name: claude-skill-pencil-reader
description: Sidecar index pattern for Pencil.dev .pen design files — prevents context overflow on large design files
author: Royalti.io

scripts.eval: echo 'Run evals manually: copy skills/pencil-reader/SKILL.md to .claude/skills/pencil-reader/ then use Claude Code eval framework with evals/evals.json'
scripts.eval:report: cat evals/benchmark.json | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));d.configs.forEach(c=>{console.log(c.name+': '+c.summary.pass_rate*100+'% pass, '+c.summary.mean_duration_ms+'ms avg, '+c.summary.mean_tokens+' tokens avg')})"
